member_pricing.name: MemberPro pricing
member_pricing.login_prefix: To get this product at member price, please
member_pricing.placeholder: MemberPro pricing appears here when a product or variant has a Member price metafield lower than the regular price.
member_pricing.card_placeholder: Add this block inside a product card section to preview member pricing.
member_pricing.cart_placeholder: Member savings on cart lines come from the automatic discount (strikethrough price + savings text). No extra block needed.
member_pricing.cart_design_hint: On the live store, logged-in customers see member pricing from the checkout discount — not from this block.
member_pricing.cart_block_placeholder: Add items to the cart to preview membership pricing.
